objectives: Achieve standards-based interoperability across the inpatient ecosystem so that orders, results, vitals, and ADT events flow between the EHR, ancillary systems, and medical devices without manual transcription, using HL7 v2, FHIR R4/R5, and SMART on FHIR.
Close the medication loop end-to-end (CPOE -> pharmacy verification -> barcode medication administration -> eMAR documentation) to reduce medication errors and adverse drug events at the bedside.

Detect clinical deterioration earlier by continuously ingesting bedside monitor and wearable vitals to compute Early Warning Scores (NEWS2/MEWS) and surface real-time sepsis and rapid-response alerts with minimized false alarms.

Streamline nurse and physician inpatient workflows (assessments, rounding, documentation, hand-offs, and care-team communication) to reduce cognitive load and time-to-chart while supporting staffing shortages.

Guarantee HIPAA/HITECH-grade security, auditability, and PHI privacy with role-based access, encryption in transit and at rest, OAuth 2.0 / SMART App Launch authorization, and comprehensive audit logging.
Provide high-availability, 24/7 backend services that operate reliably during peak load and degrade gracefully, since inpatient care is continuous and downtime is patient-safety-critical.
Integrate imaging (DICOM/PACS) and AI-assisted decision support into the clinical workflow so radiology, labs, and predictive models are accessible at the point of care.
Enable real-time bed management, patient flow, and capacity/census visibility from admission through transfer and discharge to optimize throughput across acute-care units and the ICU.
features: Computerized Provider Order Entry (CPOE) with order sets, drug-drug/drug-allergy interaction checking, and pharmacy verification routing.
Barcode Medication Administration (BCMA) with positive patient ID, the five-rights verification, and closed-loop integration to infusion pumps and automated dispensing cabinets.
Electronic Medication Administration Record (eMAR) with due/past-due/administered alerts and a continuous medication timeline per patient.
Real-time vital-signs capture and continuous monitoring with automated Early Warning Scores (NEWS2/MEWS) and central-station surveillance dashboards.
Sepsis and clinical-deterioration alerting driven by streaming predictive models (e.g., LSTM/ML risk scores) with rapid-response team escalation and false-alarm suppression.
Nursing documentation and flowsheets (assessments, intake/output, wound care, care plans) with structured templates and voice/quick-charting.
Physician rounding, progress notes, and clinical hand-off / SBAR communication with secure care-team messaging and on-call escalation.
Admission, Discharge, and Transfer (ADT) event processing and real-time bed/census management with patient-flow and capacity dashboards.
SMART on FHIR app launch embedding third-party clinical apps and decision support directly inside the Epic/Cerner workflow with OAuth 2.0 / SMART App Launch.
HL7 v2 / FHIR interface engine for ingesting ORU lab results, ADT feeds, and ORM orders, with bidirectional device and EHR connectivity.
Medical-device integration gateway translating proprietary monitor, ventilator, and infusion-pump protocols (IEEE 11073 / HL7 PCD) into the chart.
DICOM/PACS image viewing and radiology results integration with FDA-cleared AI imaging tools surfaced at the point of care.
Lab, microbiology, and diagnostic results review with critical-value flagging and trend/graphing.
Role-based access control, full audit trail, break-the-glass access, and HIPAA-compliant PHI encryption and consent management.

objectives: Streamline the full outpatient encounter lifecycle (scheduling, registration, check-in, documentation, billing) within a single unified, interoperable system
Improve patient access and engagement through self-service portals, online scheduling, automated reminders, and integrated telehealth
Ensure clinical safety and care quality via e-prescribing, real-time clinical decision support, and drug-interaction/allergy alerting
Achieve and maintain regulatory compliance (HIPAA, ONC certification, FHIR/USCDI interoperability) across all data and transport
Optimize practice revenue through integrated practice management, real-time eligibility verification, and revenue cycle management
Enable seamless data exchange with hospitals, labs, pharmacies, payers, and other EHRs using HL7 v2, FHIR, and SMART on FHIR
Reduce clinician documentation burden through templates, AI-assisted charting, and workflow automation
features: Patient scheduling and calendar with online self-scheduling, resource/room management, and waitlist
Automated appointment reminders and recall (SMS, email, voice) with two-way confirmation
Secure patient portal: appointment booking, results viewing, secure messaging, and bill pay
Digital intake and self check-in: pre-registration, forms, insurance card capture, and kiosk/QR check-in
Real-time insurance eligibility and benefits verification at the point of scheduling and care
Clinical documentation with specialty-specific templates, problem lists, and AI-assisted/ambient note capture
E-prescribing (eRx) with controlled substances (EPCS), medication history, and formulary/price transparency lookup
Clinical decision support: drug-drug/allergy interaction alerts, evidence-based protocols, and care-gap closure
Integrated telehealth video visits with in-app waiting room and visit documentation
Lab and imaging orders/results integration with electronic ordering and result inbox/routing
Practice management and medical billing: charge capture, auto-generated claims, ERA/EOB, and denial management
Interoperability layer: HL7 v2 interfaces, FHIR R4 APIs, SMART on FHIR app launch, and USCDI data export
Population health and quality reporting dashboards (MIPS/quality measures, value-based care, care gaps)
Role-based access control, audit logging, and HIPAA-compliant encryption for PHI at rest and in transit

objectives: Enable secure, low-latency real-time video/audio visits between patients and clinicians with HIPAA-compliant end-to-end encrypted media (SRTP) and TLS-protected signaling, backed by a signed BAA from any third-party communication vendor

Achieve clinical interoperability by exchanging patient demographics, encounters, medications, and clinical notes with EHRs (Epic, Cerner/Oracle Health, athenahealth) via HL7 v2 and FHIR R4/R5 APIs and middleware
Deliver a complete virtual-visit workflow: intake, eligibility/insurance verification, scheduling, virtual waiting room, e-prescribing (eRx/EPCS), and post-visit documentation/billing
Support multi-modal asynchronous and synchronous care: secure messaging, store-and-forward (image/document sharing), and on-demand vs. scheduled visits across web and mobile
Integrate remote patient monitoring (RPM) data from wearables and home medical devices (BP cuffs, glucometers, pulse oximeters) into the clinician view with threshold-based alerting

Ensure regulatory compliance and auditability: PHI encryption at rest (AES-256), full audit logging of every access, role-based access control, consent capture, and configurable data-retention policies
Maintain reliability and call quality at scale with adaptive bitrate, TURN fallback, connection-quality telemetry, and graceful degradation to audio-only on poor networks
Streamline reimbursement and operations by integrating payments (copays), claims/billing codes, and provider scheduling availability
features: HIPAA-compliant 1:1 and group video consultations with screen sharing, in-call chat, and audio-only fallback
Virtual waiting room with provider queue management, patient check-in, and real-time presence/status
Appointment scheduling and calendar management with provider availability, time-zone handling, and SMS/email reminders
Secure asynchronous messaging and store-and-forward sharing of images, documents, and lab results between patients and care team
EHR/EMR integration via HL7 FHIR R4 and HL7 v2 for demographics, encounters, problem lists, and clinical note write-back
E-prescribing (eRx) including controlled-substance EPCS workflows and pharmacy routing
Remote patient monitoring dashboard ingesting wearable/home-device vitals over BLE/MQTT with configurable clinical alerting
AI-assisted clinical documentation: live transcription and auto-generated visit notes / ambient scribe
Patient intake and digital consent forms, insurance eligibility verification, and triage questionnaires
Integrated payments and copay collection plus billing/claims code capture for reimbursement
Session recording with encrypted-at-rest storage, retention-policy enforcement, and access-controlled playback
Audit logging, role-based access control (RBAC), and consent tracking for compliance reporting
Call-quality telemetry and adaptive media (bandwidth adaptation, TURN relay, ICE diagnostics)
Multi-language support and accessibility (captions, screen-reader compatibility) for inclusive virtual care

objectives: Deliver HIPAA and 42 CFR Part 2-compliant clinical documentation and care coordination across therapy, psychiatry, substance use, and group programs, with consent management for sensitive SUD records.
Expand access to care through integrated, secure telehealth (1:1, group, and asynchronous messaging) to reach underserved and remote populations.
Operationalize measurement-based care with validated instruments (PHQ-9, GAD-7, PCL-5, C-SSRS, ASAM) to track outcomes longitudinally and guide treatment.
Streamline psychiatric medication management with e-prescribing, EPCS for controlled substances, and mandated PDMP checks inside the clinical workflow.
Maximize reliable reimbursement via behavioral-health-specific coding (CPT 90791/90834/90837/90853, SUD H-codes) and EDI 837 claim submission with denial management.
Achieve interoperability and care continuity through HL7 v2 / FHIR R4 exchange, SMART on FHIR, and lab/pharmacy/HIE integrations.
Support patient engagement and crisis safety with self-guided CBT/DBT tools, mood tracking, safety planning, and escalation to human/crisis resources.
Provide actionable clinical, operational, and value-based-care analytics through dashboards and configurable reporting for compliance and quality programs.
features: Specialty-specific clinical documentation with DSM-5/ICD-10-aligned, customizable templates for psychiatry, individual therapy, group sessions, and SUD counseling.
Integrated telehealth for 1:1 and group video visits with in-session documentation and secure messaging.
Measurement-based care engine: administer/score validated assessments (PHQ-9, GAD-7, PCL-5, Columbia/C-SSRS, ASAM) with longitudinal outcome dashboards.
e-Prescribing with EPCS for Schedule II-V controlled substances, integrated PDMP checks, medication history, and formulary/prior-authorization lookup.
Patient scheduling, waitlist, and automated appointment reminders with no-show tracking.
Behavioral-health revenue cycle: eligibility verification, CPT/HCPCS H-code coding, EDI 837P/837I claim submission, ERA/EOB posting, and denial management.
Consent and privacy management supporting 42 CFR Part 2 segmentation for substance use records and granular release-of-information controls.
Treatment planning and care coordination with problem/goal/objective tracking, ASAM level-of-care placement, and group/program census management.
Patient-facing mobile app: self-guided CBT/DBT exercises, mood and symptom journaling, mindfulness, homework assignments, and progress visibility.
AI-assisted clinical support: ambient session transcription, auto-generated progress notes, and risk/insight surfacing for clinicians.
Crisis and safety tooling: collaborative safety plans, C-SSRS suicide-risk screening, and clear escalation pathways to crisis lines/988.
Interoperability layer: HL7 v2 and FHIR R4 APIs, SMART on FHIR app launch, lab/HIE integration, and CCDA exchange.
Audit logging, RBAC, and MFA with full access trails for all PHI to support HIPAA security and compliance reporting.
Configurable analytics and no-code report builder for clinical outcomes, utilization, and value-based-care/payer reporting.

objectives: Continuously and reliably capture patient vital signs (BP, SpO2, glucose, weight, ECG, heart rate) from FDA-cleared connected/wearable devices in the home and stream them to the care team with minimal manual entry
Achieve clinical-grade interoperability by exchanging data with EHR/EMR systems via HL7 v2 and FHIR R4 (SMART on FHIR), so RPM data lands in the clinician's existing chart workflow
Enable timely clinical intervention through configurable thresholds, alerting, escalation, and risk stratification that surface deteriorating patients before adverse events
Maintain end-to-end HIPAA / HITECH (and where relevant GDPR) compliance: encryption in transit and at rest, RBAC, audit logging, consent management, and signed BAAs with infrastructure vendors
Support reimbursable RPM/CCM/RTM care models by tracking device-days, monitoring minutes, and generating CMS billing documentation (e.g., CPT 99453/99454/99457/99458)
Deliver an accessible, low-friction patient/caregiver experience (large fonts, multilingual, offline buffering, low-bandwidth tolerance) suited to elderly and chronically ill home users
Integrate synchronous telehealth (video visits) and asynchronous messaging so monitoring data and virtual care live in one platform
Scale ingestion of high-volume continuous biosignal/waveform streams with resilient, observable cloud infrastructure and defined data residency
features: Connected-device pairing and ingestion supporting BLE and cellular medical devices (BP cuffs, pulse oximeters, glucometers, scales, ECG patches, thermometers) plus a device-agnostic integration layer
Native Apple HealthKit and Android Health Connect sync to pull steps, heart rate, sleep, SpO2 and vitals without redundant manual capture
Real-time vitals dashboard for clinicians with trend charts, time-series visualization, and per-patient longitudinal history
Configurable clinical alert rules with thresholds, severity tiers, escalation chains, and push/SMS/email notifications to care teams and caregivers
Patient/caregiver mobile app with guided measurement reminders, medication adherence tracking, symptom surveys (PROs/ePRO), and large-font accessible UI
HIPAA-compliant telehealth video visits (WebRTC) with in-app secure messaging and care-team chat
FHIR R4 / HL7 v2 interoperability engine with SMART on FHIR launch, $export bulk data, and C-CDA/HL7v2-to-FHIR conversion for EHR integration
Risk stratification and AI/ML analytics on streaming biosignals to flag deterioration, predict readmission risk, and reduce alert fatigue
RPM/CCM/RTM billing and compliance module tracking device-days, monitoring minutes, and auto-generating CMS-billable documentation
Role-based access control, consent management, and comprehensive audit logging across patients, caregivers, nurses, and physicians
Offline buffering and store-and-forward at the device/gateway and app layer to preserve data continuity during connectivity gaps
Care-plan management with task assignment, escalation workflows, and population/cohort views for nurse care managers
Admin console for device fleet management, provisioning, firmware/OTA status, and inventory across enrolled patients
Reporting and export for clinical outcomes, adherence, and regulatory/QA, with configurable data residency

objectives: Streamline the end-to-end prescription lifecycle (intake, verification, dispensing, labeling, pickup) to reduce dispensing errors and turnaround time
Improve medication safety through clinical decision support: drug-drug, drug-allergy, dosage, and duplicate-therapy checks at point of dispensing
Increase patient medication adherence via refill reminders, med synchronization, and adherence tracking
Achieve interoperability with prescribers, payers, EHRs, and PDMPs using NCPDP SCRIPT, HL7 v2, and FHIR R4 standards
Automate insurance adjudication and third-party billing to maximize clean-claim rates and reimbursement
Maintain regulatory compliance (HIPAA, DEA/controlled-substance EPCS, state PDMP reporting, ONC HTI rules)
Optimize inventory: perpetual stock counts, automated reordering, lot/expiration tracking, and reduced waste
Enable clinical pharmacy services (MTM, immunizations, eCare Plans, compounding) with documentation and billing support
features: Prescription data entry, intake, and queue management with e-prescription (NCPDP SCRIPT) inbound processing
Clinical decision support engine: drug-drug/drug-allergy interaction, dose-range, and duplicate-therapy alerts
Patient profile management: demographics, allergies, medication history, insurance, and prescriber records
Real-time insurance adjudication and third-party claims (NCPDP Telecommunication D.0) with rejection handling
Automated label and bag-tag generation with barcode verification at fill and pickup
Inventory management with perpetual counts, lot/expiration tracking, automated reordering, and 340B/wholesaler integration
Controlled substance workflows: EPCS, PDMP querying/reporting, and DEA audit logging
Medication synchronization, automatic refills, and SMS/push refill-ready and reminder notifications
Patient-facing mobile app for refill requests, adherence reminders, dose logging, and delivery tracking
Medication Therapy Management (MTM) and Pharmacist eCare Plan documentation and billing
Compounding module with formula management, scale integration, and lot traceability
Dispensing automation integration (counting/packaging robots, will-call carousels) and barcode/scanner hardware support
Reporting and analytics: dispensing volume, adherence (PDC/MPR), reimbursement, and inventory dashboards
Interoperability layer: HL7 v2 / FHIR R4 APIs for EHR medication lists, allergies, and care coordination

objectives: Provide a DICOM-conformant Picture Archiving and Communication System (PACS) that ingests, stores, indexes, and retrieves studies from any modality (CT, MR, CR/DX, US, MG, PET) via DICOM C-STORE, C-FIND, C-MOVE, and DICOMweb (WADO-RS/QIDO-RS/STOW-RS).
Deliver fast, diagnostic-quality image rendering (window/level, pan/zoom, cine, MPR, MIP, 3D volume rendering) with sub-second study load times across web, desktop, and mobile clients.

Integrate seamlessly into clinical workflow via HL7 v2 (ORM/ORU), FHIR (ImagingStudy, DiagnosticReport, ServiceRequest), and DICOM Modality Worklist (MWL) to connect RIS/HIS/EHR systems and structured reporting.

Ensure regulatory compliance and data security: HIPAA, GDPR, audit logging, role-based access control, PHI encryption at rest and in transit, and adherence to IHE profiles (e.g. Scheduled Workflow, XDS-I).
Support teleradiology and multi-site collaboration with zero-footprint viewing, cross-site study sharing, and remote diagnostic reading without VPN complexity.
Enable AI/CAD integration so trained models (segmentation, detection, triage) run against incoming studies and push results back into PACS as DICOM SR, GSPS, or secondary-capture overlays.
Guarantee high availability, scalability, and long-term archival (including VNA / vendor-neutral archive patterns) with tiered storage and disaster recovery.
Provide accurate measurement, annotation, and structured-reporting tooling that persists as standards-compliant DICOM objects (Presentation States, SR, RT structures).
features: DICOM ingestion service supporting C-STORE SCP, Storage Commitment, and DICOMweb STOW-RS for receiving studies from modalities and gateways.
DICOMweb-based query/retrieve (QIDO-RS, WADO-RS, WADO-URI) plus classic DIMSE C-FIND/C-MOVE for interoperability with legacy modalities and PACS nodes.
Zero-footprint, web-based diagnostic viewer with GPU-accelerated rendering, multi-monitor hanging protocols, window/level presets, and cine playback.
Multiplanar reconstruction (MPR), maximum intensity projection (MIP), and interactive 3D volume rendering for cross-sectional studies.
Measurement and annotation tools (length, angle, ROI, ellipse, freehand) saved as DICOM Presentation States (GSPS) and Structured Reports (SR).
Modality Worklist (MWL) SCP and broker so modalities query scheduled procedures driven by RIS/HIS orders.
HL7 v2 (ORM/ORU) and FHIR (ServiceRequest, ImagingStudy, DiagnosticReport) interface engine for orders, results, and report exchange with EHR/RIS.
Radiologist worklist with prioritization, study assignment, status tracking, and prior-study auto-fetch / relevant-prior comparison side-by-side.
AI/CAD inference pipeline that triggers on study arrival, runs models (e.g. via MONAI Deploy), and writes findings back as DICOM SR or annotation overlays.
Vendor-neutral archive (VNA) storage layer with tiered hot/cold storage, lifecycle policies, compression (lossless JPEG2000/JPEG-LS), and disaster recovery.
Role-based access control, single sign-on, full audit trail, and PHI encryption to satisfy HIPAA/GDPR compliance.
Image anonymization / de-identification pipeline for research, teaching files, and external sharing.
Mobile companion apps for iOS/Android offering worklist review, image viewing, and notification of critical/STAT results for on-call radiologists.
Cross-enterprise image sharing and teleradiology portal with secure links, no-install browser viewing, and multi-tenant site isolation.

objectives: Manage the full specimen lifecycle from order and accessioning through collection, routing, testing, resulting, and archival with barcode-driven chain-of-custody
Achieve bidirectional interoperability with EHR/HIS and reference labs using HL7 v2 (ORM/ORU), FHIR R4 (ServiceRequest/DiagnosticReport), and CCDA
Connect and automate clinical analyzers via ASTM E1381/E1394 (LIS2-A2) and POCT1-A, with autoverification rules that release normal and hold/flag critical results
Enforce CLIA, CAP, HIPAA, and ISO 15189 compliance via full audit trails, QC monitoring (Levey-Jennings/Westgard), and critical-value notification
Reduce turnaround time and transcription errors through digital worklists, reflex testing, and automated result reporting at high volume
Support multiple disciplines from one platform: chemistry, hematology, microbiology, anatomic pathology, molecular/NGS, and blood bank
Deliver results securely to clinicians and patients via provider/patient portals and signed PDF reports with role-based access
Enable lab business operations: order-to-cash billing, claims, reagent/inventory management, and operational analytics
features: Order entry and electronic accessioning with barcode/QR specimen label printing and chain-of-custody tracking
Instrument/analyzer interfacing module supporting ASTM E1394 (LIS2-A2) serial/TCP, HL7, and POCT1-A connectivity with a driver library per device
Autoverification rule engine that auto-releases in-range results and holds, flags, or reflexes abnormal/critical results
Quality control management with Levey-Jennings charts, Westgard multi-rules, and QC lot tracking
Critical-value alerting and read-back documentation with automatic clinician notification (HL7/SMS/portal)
Discipline-specific worklists and workflows for chemistry, hematology, microbiology (cultures/sensitivities), anatomic pathology (gross/microscopic/sign-out), molecular, and blood bank
HL7 v2 ORM/ORU and FHIR R4 (ServiceRequest, Specimen, DiagnosticReport, Observation) interface engine for EHR/HIS and reference-lab integration
Result reporting with cumulative reports, reference-range flagging, delta checks, and signed PDF generation
Provider and patient portals for order tracking and secure result delivery with role-based access
Specimen routing, storage location, and reflex/add-on test management with sample-stability and expiration tracking
Reagent/inventory management and instrument maintenance logging
Order-to-cash billing, CPT coding, claims, and insurance verification integration
Comprehensive audit trail, e-signature, and access logging for HIPAA/CLIA/CAP compliance
Operational analytics and TAT (turnaround-time) dashboards with QC and productivity KPIs

objectives: Maximize clean-claim rate and net collections by validating, scrubbing, and correcting claims before submission to reduce payer denials and rework
Automate the end-to-end revenue cycle from patient registration and insurance eligibility (270/271) through charge capture, claim submission (837), remittance posting (835), and patient collections
Accelerate cash flow and reduce Days in Accounts Receivable (A/R) via batch claim processing, real-time claim status (276/277), and automated follow-up on aged claims
Ensure regulatory compliance with HIPAA, HITECH, PCI-DSS, and NACHA, plus accurate coding (ICD-10, CPT, HCPCS) and audit-ready transaction logging
Improve denial management and prevention with root-cause analytics, automated appeals/resubmission, and payer-specific edit rules
Enhance patient financial experience with up-front cost estimates, price transparency, payment plans, and secure self-service portals
Provide transparent financial analytics through drill-down dashboards tracking net collection rate, denial rate, A/R aging, and clean-claim rate
Interoperate with EHR/EMR systems, clearinghouses, and payers via HL7, FHIR, and X12 EDI for bidirectional clinical-to-financial exchange
features: Insurance eligibility and benefits verification with real-time X12 270/271 and FHIR-based payer queries at point of registration
Automated medical coding assistance with ICD-10/CPT/HCPCS lookup, NCCI edits, and specialty-specific code suggestion
Claim scrubbing and rules engine that flags coding/eligibility errors and payer-specific edits before 837 submission
Electronic claim submission (837P/837I/837D) and clearinghouse integration (Availity, Waystar, Optum/Change Healthcare, TriZetto)
Electronic Remittance Advice (835 ERA) auto-posting with automated payment reconciliation and adjustment/CARC-RARC handling
Real-time claim status tracking (276/277) with intelligent alerts for rejected, pending, or aged claims
Denial management workspace with root-cause categorization, automated appeals/resubmission, and worklist queues
Charge capture and superbill workflow linking clinical documentation directly to billable charges
Prior authorization automation (X12 278 / FHIR PAS) with status tracking
Patient cost estimation, price transparency, and statement generation with itemized billing
Secure patient payment portal with multiple payment options, payment plans, and stored card-on-file (PCI-DSS/tokenized)
Financial analytics dashboards with pre-built KPIs (Days in A/R, net collection rate, clean-claim rate, denial rate) and drill-down reporting
A/R management with automated follow-up workflows, aging buckets, and collection agency hand-off
Role-based access control, full audit trails, and HIPAA-compliant logging across all PHI/transaction events

objectives: Deliver a longitudinal, multi-disciplinary resident record that spans extended care episodes across SNF, assisted living, home health, and hospice settings, unlike episodic acute-care EHRs.
Automate CMS regulatory assessment and reporting workflows (MDS 3.0, OASIS-E, RAI, Quality Measures, Five-Star) to ensure compliance and accurate reimbursement.
Maximize reimbursement accuracy and revenue integrity under PDPM/PDGM payment models through case-mix capture, ICD-10 coding support, and triple-check billing reconciliation.
Reduce medication errors and adverse drug events with closed-loop eMAR/eTAR, barcode medication administration (BCMA), and pharmacy integration.
Reduce avoidable hospital readmissions and improve outcomes via predictive risk analytics, falls/pressure-injury prevention, and proactive interventional alerts.

Achieve interoperability and care coordination across the continuum using HL7 v2, C-CDA, and FHIR R4 to exchange referrals, discharge summaries, labs, and ADT with hospitals, pharmacies, and HIEs (Carequality/CommonWell).
Enforce HIPAA/HITECH security, auditability, and role-based access to PHI across web and point-of-care mobile devices.
Support point-of-care charting at the bedside so direct-care staff document ADLs, vitals, and treatments in real time rather than via delayed paper transcription.
features: Longitudinal resident EHR with demographics, problem/allergy/medication lists, advance directives, clinical notes, and customizable interdisciplinary documentation templates.
MDS 3.0 / OASIS-E assessment engine with built-in RAI logic, CAA triggering, validation, and electronic submission to CMS (iQIES/QIES).
Electronic Medication & Treatment Administration Records (eMAR/eTAR) with barcode medication administration, due/missed-dose alerts, and PRN tracking.
Care plan management with auto-generated, goal-driven interdisciplinary plans linked to assessment findings and progress notes.
Point-of-care (POC) charting for ADLs, vitals, intake/output, and behaviors on bedside tablets and handheld devices, with offline capture and sync.
PDPM/PDGM case-mix calculator with ICD-10 diagnosis mapping, HIPPS code generation, and reimbursement optimization.
Revenue cycle management: census/bed management, Medicare/Medicaid/private-pay billing, claims (UB-04/837), and triple-check reconciliation.
Pharmacy integration (eRx/NCPDP SCRIPT) for order routing, refills, drug-drug/allergy interaction checking, and formulary management.
Interoperability gateway supporting HL7 v2 messaging, C-CDA documents, and FHIR R4 APIs (Patient, Observation, MedicationRequest, CarePlan) with HIE connectivity (Carequality/CommonWell, Kno2).
Predictive analytics and quality dashboards for readmission risk scoring, falls and pressure-injury prevention, infection surveillance, and Five-Star/QM tracking.
Referral and care-transition management for hospital discharge intake, eligibility/insurance verification, and bed-board placement.
Staff and resident scheduling, time/attendance, and labor management tied to acuity and census.
Family/resident engagement portal and telehealth integration for care updates, secure messaging, and remote consults.
Audit logging, role-based access control, consent management, and HIPAA-compliant PHI encryption at rest and in transit.

objectives: Deliver an integrated dental EHR/EDR that unifies clinical charting (graphical tooth charting, periodontal charting, ADA/CDT coding) with administrative workflows in a single patient record
Streamline the dental revenue cycle: electronic 837D claim submission, real-time insurance eligibility/verification, ERA/EOB auto-posting, and patient payment collection
Automate front-office operations: online self-scheduling, recall/recare reminders, digital intake forms, and two-way patient messaging to reduce no-shows
Integrate diagnostic imaging (intraoral sensors, cameras, pan/ceph, CBCT) directly into the chart with DICOM-compliant capture, storage, and specialist/lab sharing
Achieve healthcare-grade security and compliance (HIPAA, SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001, RBAC, audit trails, encryption) for protected health information
Enable interoperability with medical EHRs, payers, and labs via HL7 FHIR R4, SMART on FHIR, X12 EDI, and SNODENT/CDT terminology
Support multi-location and specialty workflows (orthodontics, oral surgery, endodontics, perio) with cloud access and centralized reporting
Surface AI-assisted clinical and operational decision support (radiograph pathology detection, case acceptance analytics) to improve outcomes
features: Graphical odontogram/tooth charting with periodontal charting, restorative/existing-conditions tracking, and ADA CDT procedure coding
Treatment planning with phased plans, cost estimates, insurance breakdown, and digital patient consent capture
Appointment scheduler with online self-booking, operatory/provider views, recall/recare lists, and automated SMS/email reminders
Integrated dental imaging: intraoral sensor and camera acquisition, bitewing/pan/ceph capture, and CBCT 3D volume viewing, DICOM-compliant
AI radiograph analysis for caries, bone loss, and pathology detection plus annotation overlays on images
Insurance eligibility verification, electronic claims (837D/X12) submission, attachments (NEA), and ERA/EOB auto-posting
Patient ledger, billing, statements, payment plans, and integrated card/ACH payment processing
Digital patient intake and forms (medical/dental history, HIPAA consent) with kiosk/online completion and e-signature
Patient portal and companion mobile app for booking, forms, balances, image/treatment viewing, and secure messaging
Teledentistry module with video visits, asynchronous photo/triage capture, and remote screening
Perio charting voice entry, clinical notes templates, and Rx/e-prescribing (EPCS) integration
Lab case management and order tracking with specialist/lab image and case-file sharing
Practice analytics and reporting dashboards (production, collections, AR aging, hygiene reappointment, case acceptance KPIs)
Role-based access control, audit logging, encrypted backups, and HIPAA/SOC 2 compliance tooling

objectives: Aggregate multi-source data (EHR/clinical, claims, lab/ELR, pharmacy, ADT, wearables, vital records, and social determinants of health) into unified, longitudinal person- and population-level records to power value-based care and public health programs.

Detect, monitor, and respond to disease outbreaks and notifiable conditions in near real-time via electronic case reporting (eCR), electronic lab reporting (ELR), and syndromic surveillance, with timely notification to state/local/CDC systems.
Stratify populations by clinical and social risk, identify care gaps, and target preventive interventions and outreach to high-risk cohorts (chronic disease, immunization, maternal/child health).
Achieve standards-based interoperability and bidirectional data exchange using HL7 FHIR R4, HL7 v2, C-CDA, LOINC, and SNOMED CT across providers, payers, registries (IIS), and public health agencies.

Support equitable, community-level interventions by integrating SDoH data, geospatial/GIS hotspot analysis, and community health worker (CHW) field workflows, including offline-capable data collection.
Provide actionable dashboards, quality measures (HEDIS/eCQM), and analytics that drive measurable improvements in population health outcomes and regulatory reporting.
Ensure HIPAA-compliant privacy, security, consent management, de-identification, and auditable data governance across all data flows.
Enable predictive modeling and AI-driven risk identification, automated care-gap detection, and personalized intervention recommendations across large populations.
features: Multi-source data ingestion and normalization pipeline (EHR, claims, ELR/lab, pharmacy, ADT feeds, vital records, SDoH, wearables) with master patient index / record linkage.
FHIR R4 interoperability layer with SMART-on-FHIR app authorization, Bulk Data ($export), and HL7 v2 / C-CDA mapping for legacy feeds.
Electronic case reporting (eCR) and electronic laboratory reporting (ELR) intake mapped to LOINC/SNOMED, routing notifiable conditions to NEDSS/NBS-compatible jurisdiction systems.
Syndromic surveillance and outbreak detection with anomaly/alerting and configurable case definitions.
Risk stratification and predictive modeling engine for care-gap detection, cohort segmentation, and intervention recommendations.
Care coordination and care management workspace with centralized care plans, task/follow-up tracking, and referral management.
Patient/member engagement via omnichannel outreach (SMS, email, push, IVR) for reminders, screenings, and immunization recall.
Immunization registry (IIS) integration, including bulk FHIR forecasting/coverage and population vaccine outreach (e.g., VACtrac-style).
Geospatial / GIS dashboards for disease mapping, hotspot clustering, vaccine distribution, and resource allocation.
Quality measurement and reporting (HEDIS, eCQMs, value-based contract performance) with configurable measure libraries.
SDoH screening, referral, and closed-loop community resource tracking integrated into population segmentation.
Offline-capable field/mobile data collection for community health workers, case investigation, contact tracing, and household surveys.
Population and program analytics dashboards with cohort builder, trend analysis, and self-service BI.
Consent management, de-identification/anonymization, role-based access control, and audit logging for HIPAA-compliant governance.

objectives: Capture clinical trial data electronically (EDC/eSource) with full audit trails, e-signatures, and 21 CFR Part 11 / EU Annex 11 / ICH GCP E6(R3) compliance to ensure data integrity (ALCOA+).
Enable decentralized and hybrid trials with patient-facing eCOA/ePRO/eConsent across web and BYOD mobile so outcomes are collected directly from patients, caregivers, and clinicians in real time.
Standardize study data to CDISC (CDASH, SDTM, ADaM) and exchange via ODM-XML/Define-XML to produce regulator-ready, submission-quality datasets for FDA, EMA, and PMDA.
Automate randomization and trial supply management (RTSM/IRT) including drug pooling, inventory tracking, and allocation across multiple concurrent studies.
Integrate the eClinical ecosystem (EDC, CTMS, eTMF, safety/pharmacovigilance, eCOA, RTSM) and external EHR data via HL7 v2/FHIR R4 to eliminate silos and reduce manual reconciliation.
Provide centralized monitoring, risk-based quality management (RBQM), edit checks, query management, and data cleaning workflows to accelerate database lock and reduce site burden.
Protect PHI/PII end-to-end with role-based access control, encryption, de-identification, and HIPAA/GDPR-compliant data governance across multi-tenant sponsor/CRO/site hierarchies.
Deliver real-time operational and statistical analytics (enrollment, safety signals, TFLs) to sponsors, CROs, and DSMBs to support faster, evidence-based trial decisions.
features: Electronic Data Capture (EDC) with CRF/eCRF designer, dynamic edit checks, skip logic, and source data verification (SDV) workflows.
Randomization and Trial Supply Management (RTSM/IRT) with stratified/block randomization, drug pooling, and supply forecasting.
Electronic Clinical Outcome Assessments (eCOA) covering ePRO, eClinRO, and eObsRO with validated questionnaire instruments and multilingual support.
eConsent with versioned documents, comprehension checks, remote/telemedicine enrollment, and signature capture.
CDISC-compliant data standards engine: CDASH at collection, automated SDTM/ADaM mapping, and Define-XML/ODM-XML export.
Centralized monitoring and Risk-Based Quality Management (RBQM) dashboards with key risk indicators and statistical outlier detection.

objectives: Deliver a fully-digital, branchless banking experience where customers can open an account, get verified (KYC), and start transacting in minutes from a mobile app — with no physical branch visit
Achieve bank-grade security, fraud prevention, and regulatory compliance (KYC/AML, PCI-DSS, PSD2/Open Banking, GDPR, SOC 2) as a non-negotiable foundation across every platform

Provide instant, low-cost money movement: real-time domestic transfers, multi-currency/cross-border payments, P2P, and virtual + physical card issuance with instant freeze/unfreeze

Referral and rewards/cashback program with shareable links
Statements, transaction history with search/filter, and exportable records plus full audit trail for compliance

objectives: Move money reliably and atomically across accounts and rails (cards, ACH, wires, RTP/FedNow, SEPA Instant, cross-border, stablecoins) with exactly-once semantics
Maintain an immutable double-entry ledger as the financial source of truth, with every state-changing event producing a balanced atomic posting and full auditability
Enforce idempotency end-to-end (API gateway, payment service, PSP) so retries and failures never cause double charges or double settlements
Meet regulatory and security mandates: PCI DSS scope reduction via tokenization, PSD2/SCA and 3DS2, AML/KYC, and ISO 20022 messaging compliance
Detect and prevent fraud in real time so that instant, irreversible settlement does not outpace risk controls
Automate reconciliation and payment operations across PSPs, banks, and internal ledgers to close books accurately and quickly
Deliver a low-friction, conversion-optimized payment experience (drop-in/embedded checkout, wallets, saved methods) across web, mobile, and in-person
Provide observability and a deterministic payment state machine so every transaction lifecycle is traceable, debuggable, and recoverable
features: Double-entry immutable ledger with net-zero balanced postings, minor-units integer/string money handling (never floats), and append-only audit history
Idempotency layer keyed on client-supplied idempotency keys with a processed-events table checked before any state transition or posting
Deterministic payment state machine with explicitly defined transitions (initiated, authorized, captured, settled, refunded, failed, reversed)
Multi-rail money movement: card acquiring, ACH/ACH return handling, wires, RTP/FedNow, SEPA Instant, cross-border/FX, and stablecoin settlement
Tokenization and vaulting of card/bank credentials to minimize PCI DSS scope and enable network tokens and card-on-file
3D Secure 2 (3DS2) and PSD2 Strong Customer Authentication with exemption logic and frictionless flows
Drop-in / embedded checkout components and hosted payment pages supporting cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, Klarna/BNPL, and bank-redirect methods
Real-time fraud and risk scoring engine with velocity rules, device fingerprinting, and ML-based anomaly detection feeding accept/challenge/decline decisions
Automated reconciliation and settlement engine that ingests PSP/bank reports and matches them against the internal ledger with exception queues
Refunds, partial captures, disputes/chargeback management, and reversal workflows tied back to ledger postings
Webhook and event delivery system with signed payloads, retries, and ordered delivery for payment lifecycle events
ISO 20022 message generation/parsing for real-time rails and cross-border payments, with structured remittance data
In-person payments via SoftPOS / Tap to Pay and dedicated terminal readers, including EMV contactless and digital wallet acceptance
Compliance and audit tooling: KYC/AML screening, sanctions checks, transaction monitoring, and immutable audit logs for regulators

objectives: Originate loans end-to-end from application intake through credit decisioning, underwriting, document verification, and funding with a configurable, low-touch digital workflow.

Document management with OCR/extraction, e-signature (DocuSign/HelloSign), and verification audit trails.

Borrower self-service portal and mobile app: application status, document upload, repayment, and notifications.
Portfolio analytics and risk dashboards with vintage/cohort analysis, delinquency rates, and exposure reporting.
Model governance: model registry, versioning, drift/performance monitoring, and fair-lending bias auditing.
Pricing and offer engine: risk-based interest rates, loan terms, limits, and pre-qualification (soft-pull) offers.
Audit logging, immutable transaction ledger, role-based access control, and configurable compliance reporting.

Real-time and historical market data ingestion for pricing, quotes, and corporate-action handling.
Trade order management and routing with custodian/brokerage execution integrations.
Push and in-app notifications/alerts for thresholds, rebalancing events, and goal progress.

objectives: Achieve deterministic low-latency order execution and market-data ingestion (microsecond-to-millisecond budgets) so trading decisions and fills beat competing venues and participants.
Deliver a unified multi-asset OEMS supporting equities, FX, fixed income, listed/OTC derivatives, and digital assets on a single shared data and risk model.
Provide robust connectivity to exchanges, ECNs, dark pools, brokers, and liquidity venues via standardized protocols (FIX, FIX/FAST, ITCH/OUCH, native binary) with smart order routing.
Enforce real-time pre-trade risk checks, position/exposure limits, and regulatory compliance (MiFID II, Reg NMS, best-execution, audit trails) without adding meaningful latency.
Surface real-time market microstructure, P&L, and risk analytics (order book depth, VWAP/TWAP, Greeks, exposures) through responsive trader-facing dashboards and blotters.
Guarantee high availability, fault tolerance, and durable, replayable event history for orders, trades, and market events to support recovery, reconciliation, and settlement.
Enable systematic/algorithmic strategy development, backtesting, and live deployment with realistic simulation of slippage, fees, and order handling.
Maintain a complete, immutable, time-synchronized audit trail to satisfy regulatory reporting, surveillance, and post-trade analysis.
features: Unified Order & Execution Management (OEMS) covering order lifecycle from creation through compliance, allocation, and settlement with a shared risk layer.
Smart Order Router (SOR) that splits and routes orders across exchanges, dark pools, and ECNs to optimize execution price and minimize market impact.
Algorithmic execution suite (VWAP, TWAP, POV, implementation shortfall, iceberg) with configurable parameters and execution analytics (TCA).
Real-time market-data feed handlers consuming exchange protocols (FIX/FAST, ITCH/OUCH, native binary) with normalization into a canonical tick model.
Limit order book reconstruction and Level 2/3 depth-of-market visualization for microstructure analysis.
Real-time trading blotter and watchlists showing live quotes, working orders, fills, and positions updated tick-by-tick.
Pre-trade and at-trade risk engine enforcing position, exposure, fat-finger, and credit limits with sub-millisecond checks.
Real-time P&L, exposure, and Greeks/risk dashboards aggregated across desks, books, and asset classes.
Strategy backtesting and simulation environment modeling brokers, slippage, fees, partial fills, and multiple timeframes.

Multi-venue connectivity/gateway layer with session management for FIX and proprietary exchange APIs.
Mobile and web client access for monitoring positions, receiving alerts/push notifications, and placing/managing orders on the go.

objectives: Digitize the full policy lifecycle (quote, bind, issue, endorse, renew, cancel) with a policy-centric data model, event-driven workflows, and jurisdiction-aware rating/rules so personal and commercial lines can be configured and filed without code rewrites.

Accelerate claims from First Notice of Loss (FNOL) to settlement via straight-through processing, automated adjudication against coverage thresholds, and AI-assisted damage assessment to cut cycle time and loss-adjustment expense.
Reduce fraud and leakage through ML-based anomaly detection, network/link analysis, and real-time scoring of suspicious claims and applications before payout.
Deliver omnichannel self-service (mobile, web portal, embedded) so policyholders can quote, buy, pay, file claims with photo upload, track status, and access digital ID cards on demand.
Enable embedded and partner distribution via API-first, modular core systems that expose rating, underwriting, and policy services to brokers, MGAs, and point-of-sale partners.
Meet regulatory and security obligations (GDPR, HIPAA for health lines, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, state DOI filings) with audit-ready logs, data lineage, RBAC, and encryption in transit and at rest.
Improve underwriting accuracy and speed with automated risk scoring, third-party/bureau data enrichment, telematics/IoT signals, and explainable pricing models.
Lower total cost of ownership by moving to cloud-native, containerized, independently scalable microservices that support low-downtime upgrades and elastic peak (renewal/CAT-event) loads.
features: Policy Administration System (PAS) covering full lifecycle servicing for personal and commercial lines with endorsements, renewals, cancellations, and reinstatements.
Configurable rating and pricing engine externalized as a standalone service, supporting multi-line, multi-currency products and ISO/bureau rate integration.
Underwriting workbench with automated risk scoring, rules-based referral/decisioning, and third-party data enrichment (bureau, credit, telematics, IoT).
FNOL intake and end-to-end claims management with workflow engine, task queues, event triggers, and straight-through auto-adjudication on covered thresholds.
AI computer-vision damage assessment: photo/video upload from mobile, automated estimate generation, and OCR of handwritten/scanned claim documents.
ML fraud detection and SIU scoring across claims and applications using anomaly detection and link/network analysis with real-time flags.
Billing and payments module with installment schedules, one-tap renewal payment, refunds, commissions, and PCI-compliant processing.
Customer self-service portal and mobile app: digital ID cards, policy documents, claim status tracking, renewal reminders, and chat/support.
Agent/broker and MGA portal with quote-and-bind, book-of-business management, commission tracking, and producer onboarding.
Document generation and management (policy packets, declarations, certificates of insurance) with e-signature and template configuration.
API gateway exposing rating, underwriting, policy, and claims services for embedded insurance and partner point-of-sale distribution.
Regulatory and compliance tooling: jurisdiction-aware rules, state DOI filing exports, audit-ready logs, data lineage, and RBAC.
Analytics and reporting dashboards for loss ratios, reserves, claims throughput, fraud KPIs, and underwriting performance.
Conversational AI / NLP virtual assistant for first-line customer service, intake, and claims-status queries.

objectives: Automate end-to-end regulatory compliance workflows (KYC/CDD/KYB onboarding, AML transaction monitoring, sanctions/PEP screening, and regulatory reporting) to reduce manual effort, cost, and false positives.

Maintain an immutable, audit-ready trail for every compliance decision, alert disposition, and report submission so institutions can demonstrate defensibility to regulators (FATF, FinCEN/FINTRAC, EBA, FCA, etc.).
Detect financial crime in near-real-time by combining rules engines, ML risk scoring, and graph-based entity/network analysis to surface suspicious activity and beneficial-ownership risk.

Continuously track and operationalize changing regulatory obligations across jurisdictions, mapping rule changes to internal controls, policies, and reporting templates (regulatory change management / horizon scanning).
Auto-generate and submit reports in regulator-approved formats (SAR/STR, CTR, FINREP/COREP, XBRL/XML) with validation against jurisdiction-specific schemas before filing.
Guarantee security, data residency, and privacy compliance (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, PCI-DSS) with encryption, access controls, and tenant isolation suitable for regulated financial data.
Provide explainable, traceable AI/ML decisioning (model risk governance, audit links, contextual narratives) so compliance officers can justify automated outcomes.
Deliver low-latency, configurable dashboards and case-management workflows that give compliance teams a unified, multi-jurisdiction view of risk and investigations.
features: KYC/CDD/KYB onboarding with document OCR, government-ID verification, biometric liveness/facial-match, and conditional risk-based onboarding flows.
Real-time and batch AML transaction monitoring with configurable detection scenarios, thresholds, and behavioral analytics.
Sanctions, PEP, and adverse-media screening against consolidated global watchlists with fuzzy/phonetic name matching and ongoing rescreening.
Entity resolution and network/graph analysis to map ultimate beneficial owners (UBO), hidden relationships, and money-laundering rings.
Case management and investigation workspace with alert triage, collaboration, evidence attachments, SLA tracking, and full audit trail.
Automated regulatory report generation and e-filing (SAR/STR, CTR, FINREP/COREP) in regulator-approved formats (XBRL, XML) with pre-submission schema validation.
Explainable AI/ML risk-scoring engine that reduces false positives and produces human-readable narratives and decision rationale.
Regulatory change management / horizon scanning that ingests regulator feeds, maps obligations to controls, and triggers heatmaps and alerts.
Configurable rules engine and no-code/low-code scenario builder allowing compliance analysts to author detection logic without engineering.
Customer risk assessment and dynamic risk-rating with continuous KYC (perpetual/event-driven refresh).
Real-time alerting and configurable compliance dashboards with regulatory heatmaps and multi-geography oversight.
Audit logging and immutable evidence store (append-only / WORM) for tamper-evident records and regulator examination support.
Integration/API layer connecting to core banking, payment rails, GRC/policy systems, data vendors, and blockchain analytics providers.
Role-based access control, multi-tenancy, encryption-at-rest/in-transit, and data-residency controls for regulated data governance.

objectives: Give users a single consolidated view of all their finances by securely aggregating accounts across banks, cards, loans, and investments via open-banking/data-aggregation APIs (Plaid, Yodlee, MX, Akoya).
Automatically import and accurately categorize transactions so users understand where their money goes with minimal manual effort.
Enable budgeting and spending controls, including auto-generated budgets based on spending trends and overspend alerts.
Help users set, track, and achieve financial goals such as emergency funds, debt payoff, large purchases, and retirement savings.
Compute and track net worth, cash flow, and forecasts to surface trends and proactive insights.
Deliver timely, contextual notifications (bill due dates, low balance, large or unusual charges, subscription renewals).
Maintain bank-grade security and regulatory compliance (encryption, credential tokenization, SOC 2 / ISO 27001, PCI-DSS, GDPR/CCPA).
Increase financial engagement and literacy through personalized, AI-driven insights and gamified savings experiences.
features: Multi-institution account aggregation with secure bank linking (Plaid Link / Yodlee FastLink) and automatic balance and transaction sync.
Automated transaction categorization with ML-powered enrichment, merchant cleanup, and user-editable rules.
Budget creation and tracking, including auto-suggested budgets from historical spending and per-category spending limits.
Net worth tracking that nets assets against liabilities across all linked accounts over time.
Financial goal setting and progress tracking (emergency fund, debt payoff, savings targets) with visualizations.
Cash-flow forecasting and recurring income/expense detection to project upcoming balances.
Bill tracking and subscription management with renewal detection and cancellation reminders.
Configurable alerts and push notifications: upcoming bills, low balance, large purchases, duplicate charges, and unusual activity.
Spending analytics dashboards with interactive charts (by category, merchant, time period, and trend lines).
Debt payoff planning tools (avalanche/snowball strategies) with interest and payoff-date projections.
AI-driven personalized insights and a conversational assistant for spending questions and recommendations.
Manual transaction and cash entry, transaction splitting, tagging, and notes for items not covered by linked accounts.
Investment/portfolio tracking with holdings, performance, and allocation views.
Data export (CSV/PDF reports) and tax-time summaries, plus secure multi-factor authentication and biometric login.

objectives: Deliver secure, high-stakes certification and licensure exams with verifiable identity and defensible exam integrity (proctoring, lockdown, audit trails)
Manage the full credential lifecycle: application/eligibility, scheduling, exam delivery, scoring, issuance, renewal, and expiration tracking
Track continuing education (CEU/CME/CNE/CLE/CPE) credits against license requirements with automated assignment, import of external credits, and renewal-deadline reminders
Maintain a psychometrically sound item bank and scoring engine (IRT/CAT, equating, pass/fail standard-setting) so scores are valid and legally defensible
Ensure regulatory and accreditation compliance (ANSI/ISO 17024, ACCME PARS, SOC 2, accessibility/ADA, data residency) and provide auditable reporting to boards and governing bodies
Issue tamper-evident, verifiable digital credentials (Open Badges / verifiable credentials) that third parties can validate in real time
Scale to large concurrent exam cohorts and multi-tenant certifying bodies while protecting candidate PII and exam content
Provide candidates a single portal to apply, schedule, sit exams, view results, and manage renewals across devices
features: Item bank authoring with multiple item types (multiple-choice, multiple-response, hotspot, drag-and-drop, scenario/case-based, video/audio stimulus) and metadata tagging to a blueprint
Computer-adaptive (CAT) and linear-on-the-fly (LOFT) exam form assembly with IRT-based item selection and exposure control
Secure exam delivery with kiosk/lockdown mode (Safe Exam Browser integration), copy/paste and app-switch blocking, and offline-resilient session recovery
Multi-mode proctoring: live human, AI auto-proctoring, and hybrid spot-check with webcam/screen/audio capture and 360-degree room scan
AI integrity monitoring: gaze/face-presence tracking, multi-person detection, background-noise flags, and deepfake/GAN-artifact detection on identity media
Identity verification: government-ID match, biometric/facial comparison, and keystroke or liveness checks before exam launch
Candidate portal for eligibility/application intake, exam scheduling and rescheduling, payments, and downloadable results/score reports
Continuing education credit tracking: CEU/CME/CNE/CLE/CPE accrual, external-credit import with documentation upload, and progress bars toward renewal
Automated certificate and verifiable digital badge issuance (Open Badges 3.0 / W3C Verifiable Credentials) with a public verification page
License/credential expiration and renewal automation with reminder notifications and renewal workflows
Psychometric analytics and standard-setting: item analysis (p-values, point-biserial), differential item functioning (DIF), reliability, equating, and Angoff/modified-Angoff cut-score tooling
Configurable exam scheduling and seat management for both online proctoring and physical test-center delivery
LMS/registry integrations (Canvas, Moodle, Blackboard via LTI) plus API/webhooks to boards, associations, and HR/credential registries
Role-based admin console with compliance reporting (ANSI/ISO 17024, ACCME PARS exports), audit logs, and incident review of flagged exam sessions

objectives: Enable equitable access to curriculum for learners with sensory, motor, cognitive, and communication disabilities by meeting WCAG 2.2 AA (and emerging EAA/Section 508) standards across every product surface.

Support multi-modal input and output so learners can interact via touch, switch access, eye gaze, keyboard, voice, and screen readers (VoiceOver, TalkBack, NVDA) without relearning interaction patterns.

Provide Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) capabilities for non-verbal and minimally-verbal students, including symbol-based boards, core vocabulary, and natural-sounding text-to-speech.
Operationalize IEP/504 goals: let educators set individualized accommodations, track progress against measurable goals, and generate data for IEP reviews and IDEA compliance.
Reduce cognitive load and sensory overload through customizable UI (high-contrast modes, dyslexia-friendly fonts, reduced motion, simplified layouts, adjustable pacing).
Empower differentiated instruction and scaffolding so teachers and therapists (SLPs, OTs) can tailor content difficulty, reinforcement, and prompting per learner.
Ensure privacy and safety for a vulnerable, minor population (FERPA/COPPA compliance, data minimization, secure rostering and consent).
features: AAC symbol communication boards with customizable core/fringe vocabulary, category folders, and tap-to-speak output.
Natural text-to-speech (TTS) with adjustable rate, pitch, and voice selection, plus word/sentence highlighting (read-along).
Speech-to-text dictation and voice control for students with motor or writing difficulties (dysgraphia support).
Switch access and scanning (single/dual-switch, auto/step scanning) with configurable dwell, timing, and selection cues.
Eye-gaze / eye-tracking input support with calibration, gaze dwell selection, and large interactive targets.
High-contrast themes, color-blind safe palettes, dyslexia-friendly fonts (OpenDyslexic/Lexend), text resizing, and reduced-motion mode.
Full screen-reader semantics (labels, roles, hints, focus order) verified against VoiceOver, TalkBack, and NVDA.
IEP/504 accommodation profiles per learner with progress tracking, goal mastery dashboards, and exportable data reports.
Visual schedules, first-then boards, social stories, and token/reward reinforcement systems for behavioral support.
Customizable touch targets (minimum 48x48dp), touch accommodations (hold duration, ignore repeat, tap assist), and one-switch-friendly layouts.
Differentiated content authoring: teachers build leveled activities, adjust prompting/scaffolding, and assign per-student.
Picture/symbol-supported reading and AAC-to-text translation (e.g., embedding-based text-to-symbol matching).
Offline-first operation with sync, so therapy/classroom use is uninterrupted by connectivity.
Educator/therapist portal with secure rostering (Clever/ClassLink), consent management, and FERPA/COPPA-compliant data handling.

objectives: Drive measurable proficiency gains across reading, writing, listening, and speaking mapped to a recognized framework such as CEFR, with placement and progress checkpoints.
Maximize long-term vocabulary and grammar retention via a spaced-repetition system (SRS) tuned to each learner's memory model.
Build durable daily study habits through gamification (streaks, XP, leagues, goals) and notification-driven re-engagement.
Deliver low-stakes speaking and pronunciation practice with AI conversation partners and phoneme-level feedback so learners move from knowing to speaking.
Personalize the learning path adaptively, choosing the next exercise from performance, error patterns, and forgetting curves.
Support reliable offline and cross-device learning with synced lessons, audio, and review queues.
Scale content authoring and localization (e.g., server-driven UI) so courses ship without app-store releases.
Provide learners and teachers with analytics, progress reports, and certificates.
features: Structured course/skill tree with bite-sized lessons mapped to CEFR levels and a placement test that skips known material.
Spaced-repetition review queue (SRS) that resurfaces vocabulary and grammar at optimal intervals using FSRS or SM-2 style scheduling.
Multi-modal exercise types: multiple choice, word-tap/sentence building, fill-in-the-blank, matching pairs, translation, and listening dictation.
Speech recognition with phoneme/word-level pronunciation scoring and corrective feedback.
AI conversation partner (LLM-driven, optionally real-time voice) for free-form roleplay and guided speaking practice with mistake correction.
High-quality multilingual text-to-speech for example sentences, with adjustable speed and karaoke-style word highlighting.
Gamification layer: streaks, XP, daily goals, hearts/energy, leagues/leaderboards, badges, and achievements.
Push notifications and habit reminders for streak protection and lapsed-learner re-engagement.
Offline mode: downloadable lessons and audio plus a locally cached review queue that syncs when reconnected.
Personalized adaptive path / session generator that picks the next exercise from performance, error history, and forgetting curve.
Progress dashboard and analytics (words learned, accuracy, time-on-task, skill mastery) with shareable certificates.
Content authoring/CMS and localization pipeline with server-driven UI so courses and exercises ship without app updates.
Social and community features: friend follows, clubs/study groups, shared progress, and discussion/comment threads.
Subscription and monetization (freemium tiers, family plans) with in-app purchase and entitlement management.

objectives: Maximize conversion rate and average order value across the discovery-to-checkout funnel through fast, relevant search, AI-driven personalization, and frictionless checkout

objectives: Shift buyers from phone/email/fax ordering to 24/7 self-service portals, since ~80% of B2B buyers prefer self-service for reordering, freeing sales reps for higher-value relationship work
Increase Average Order Value (AOV) by removing ordering friction and surfacing volume/tiered pricing breaks, cross-sell, and fast reordering of past purchases
Reduce manual order-entry errors and costly supply-chain mistakes by syncing catalog, pricing, inventory, and orders to a single source of truth (ERP) in real time
Enforce account-specific contract pricing, customer-specific catalogs, and multi-org account hierarchies with role-based purchasing approvals
Support flexible B2B payment workflows (Net 30/60/90 terms, purchase orders, credit lines, partial shipments) without breaking the checkout experience
Enable field sales reps to capture orders anywhere, including fully offline, with automatic sync so no order is lost due to poor connectivity
Modernize legacy distribution operations via API-first/headless architecture that integrates ERP, CRM, and OMS without ripping out core systems
Provide real-time inventory visibility and accurate availability/ETA so buyers can plan large bulk orders with confidence
features: Customer-specific and tiered/volume pricing engine with contract price lists and per-account catalogs
Bulk ordering tools: CSV/quick-order pad, SKU-and-quantity grid entry, saved order templates, and one-click reorder from history
Net terms, purchase-order (PO) checkout, credit-line limits, and partial/backorder fulfillment support
B2B account hierarchies with multiple buyers per company, spending limits, and multi-step order approval workflows
Real-time inventory and availability synced from ERP/WMS, including per-warehouse stock and ETA on out-of-stock items
High-SKU faceted product catalog with fast search, filters, and typo tolerance for tens of thousands of SKUs
Self-service buyer portal: order history, invoice download, reorder, return requests, and support tickets
Quote/RFQ and CPQ (configure-price-quote) flow for negotiated and custom-configured bulk orders
ERP/CRM/accounting integration (SAP, Microsoft Dynamics, NetSuite, Infor, QuickBooks) for orders, pricing, and reconciliation
Sales-rep mobile app with offline order capture, barcode scanning, customer-specific pricing, and auto-sync on reconnect
Multi-currency, multi-language, and multi-store/multi-brand catalogs for distributors serving several regions or banners
Tax automation and compliance (Avalara/TaxJar) plus tax-exempt certificate handling for resellers
Promotions and discount rules engine: percentage-off, fixed price, volume breaks, and customer-segment-specific deals
Order, shipment, and proof-of-delivery tracking with notifications and downloadable packing slips/invoices

Deliver a fast, branded, omnichannel buying experience (web, PWA, native app, social) with sub-second storefront performance and consistent design control
Increase conversion and reduce cart abandonment via frictionless checkout, multiple payment methods, and AI-driven recommendations and merchandising
Operate a composable/headless architecture so the brand can iterate front-end experiences independently of commerce backend logic and scale for drops/flash sales
Integrate marketing, email/SMS, attribution, and analytics tightly to lower CAC and prove ROI on paid acquisition
Support reliable order management, real-time inventory, and 3PL/fulfillment integration to meet delivery and returns expectations

Analytics and attribution dashboards (conversion funnels, LTV/CAC, cohort, and channel ROAS reporting)
Tax, shipping rate, and fraud/risk integrations (real-time tax calc, carrier rates, address validation, fraud scoring)

objectives: Achieve liquidity by solving the chicken-and-egg problem: bootstrap a critical mass of sellers (supply) and buyers (demand) in the same categories/geographies so listings reliably find buyers and buyers reliably find inventory.
Maximize take-rate revenue (selling fees, transaction/payment fees, optional listing/promotion/shipping-label fees) while keeping friction low enough that individual sellers keep listing.

Establish trust and safety between strangers via identity verification (KYC), ratings/reviews, buyer protection, escrow-style fund holding, and dispute resolution so transactions feel safe enough to complete on-platform.
Drive frictionless listing creation so non-professional sellers can post an item in under a minute (photo capture, AI auto-fill of title/category/price, prefilled shipping).
Increase GMV per user through discovery: personalized feeds, search relevance, recommendations, cross-listing, and re-engagement (offers, likes/follows, price-drop alerts).
Reduce off-platform leakage and fraud (deals taken to cash/DM, chargebacks, counterfeit/prohibited items) so payments and protections stay inside the platform.
Operationalize logistics: integrated shipping labels, tracking, prepaid postage, and (optionally) authentication/warehousing to standardize fulfillment between casual sellers and buyers.

Maintain regulatory and payment compliance at scale: PCI-DSS, marketplace seller payout/1099-K reporting, marketplace facilitator tax collection, AML/sanctions screening, and regional data-privacy rules.
features: Fast listing flow with in-app camera, multi-photo upload, AI-assisted title/description/category suggestion, and dynamic price recommendations.
Search and discovery powered by full-text search, faceted filters (size, brand, condition, price), and typo-tolerant relevance ranking.
Personalized home feed and recommendations (recently viewed, similar items, followed sellers/brands, price-drop alerts).
Buyer-seller in-app messaging/chat with offer/counter-offer negotiation and bundling of multiple items.
Ratings, reviews, and seller reputation profiles (response time, ship time, item-as-described, dispute history).
Identity verification / KYC and account onboarding (ID checks via providers like Onfido/Jumio, MFA, fraud-risk scoring).
Secure split payments via a marketplace payments provider (Stripe Connect / PayPal / Adyen) holding funds in escrow until delivery confirmation, then paying out the seller minus platform fee.
Integrated shipping: prepaid/discounted labels, carrier rate calculation, tracking, and delivery confirmation that triggers payout.
Dispute resolution and buyer-protection workflow with evidence upload (photos, chat logs, tracking), refunds, returns, and case mediation.
Trust & safety / moderation tooling: prohibited-item detection, counterfeit/brand-authenticity checks, content moderation, and abuse/fraud flagging.
Wishlist/likes/follows and social engagement (sharing items, following sellers, activity feed) to drive re-engagement.
Seller dashboard with listings management, sales analytics, payout history, offers, and promotion/boost tools.
Push notifications and email/SMS lifecycle messaging (new offer, sold, shipped, price drop, abandoned cart).
Cross-listing / bulk listing and inventory management for power sellers, plus categories/taxonomy and brand catalogs.

objectives: Decouple the customer-facing storefront from backend commerce logic via an API-first contract so frontend and backend evolve, deploy, and scale independently.
Adopt MACH-aligned architecture (Microservices, API-first, Cloud-native, Headless) so catalog, cart, checkout, search, CMS, payments, and promotions are swappable best-of-breed services.
Deliver consistent omnichannel commerce (web, native mobile, PWA, kiosk, voice, IoT) from a single set of commerce APIs.
Maximize storefront performance and Core Web Vitals via SSR/SSG/edge rendering, CDN delivery, and sub-50ms faceted search to drive conversion and SEO.
Avoid vendor lock-in by composing interchangeable providers connected over standardized APIs and event streams.
Give developers full control of UX, branding, and deploy cadence while business users retain content, merchandising, and promotion control through the connected CMS/PIM.
Establish an event-driven integration layer so services stay loosely coupled and order/inventory orchestration is resilient and observable.
features: Product catalog and PDP rendering driven entirely by Storefront/GraphQL APIs (e.g., Shopify Storefront API, commercetools, Medusa) instead of a coupled theme.
Decoupled cart and checkout flow consuming commerce-engine cart/checkout APIs with hosted or embedded payment elements.
Faceted product search and autocomplete powered by a dedicated search service (Algolia, Typesense, or Meilisearch) with typo tolerance and relevance tuning.
Headless CMS-driven content slots: landing pages, banners, blog, and merchandising managed in Sanity/Contentful/Strapi and composed into storefront pages.
Server-side rendering, static generation, and incremental/edge revalidation (ISR) for fast first paint and SEO-friendly pages served from a CDN.
Integrated payments via Stripe/Adyen/PayPal/Klarna using PaymentIntent + payment-element flows with PCI-compliant tokenization.
Customer accounts, authentication, wishlists, and order history backed by commerce-engine customer APIs (plus optional auth provider).
Real-time inventory and pricing sync through webhooks/event streams between the commerce engine, OMS, and storefront cache.
Multi-region, multi-currency, multi-language (i18n/localization) storefronts driven by locale-aware API responses and CMS localization.
Promotions, discounts, and personalization (cart rules, segments, A/B content) applied via the engine's promotions service and CMS targeting.
Native mobile commerce apps and PWAs reusing the same commerce APIs/SDKs (Shopify Storefront SDK, Medusa JS SDK) for shared types and logic.
Edge/serverless functions for cart mutations, BFF (backend-for-frontend) aggregation, and personalization at low latency.
Analytics, tag management, and conversion tracking wired through GTM/server-side events without coupling to a monolith.
CI/CD with preview deployments, environment promotion, and (for enterprise) MACH-style orchestrated deployment (e.g., MACH composer) across cloud providers.

objectives: Convert social engagement into in-context purchases by collapsing discovery, content, and native checkout into a single frictionless flow that never forces the user to leave the app or feed.
Drive real-time, interactive selling through live shopping (livestream and shoppable video) with low-latency video, in-stream product pinning, and instant buy-now overlays.
Build trust and social proof at scale via user-generated content, photo/video reviews, influencer endorsements, and creator/affiliate storefronts.
Power a creator/influencer/affiliate economy with attributable links, commission tracking, creator payouts, and per-creator analytics.
Deliver hyper-personalized, socially-aware product discovery using recommendation systems that blend behavioral signals, trending content, and peer/social influence.
Integrate deeply with external social and commerce ecosystems (TikTok Shop, Instagram/Meta, Pinterest, Shopify, WooCommerce) for catalog sync, product tagging, and cross-channel selling.
Maximize conversion and minimize cart abandonment with native checkout, saved payment methods, and one-tap/express payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Shop Pay, Stripe/PayPal).
Scale to high-concurrency live events (thousands to tens of thousands of simultaneous viewers) while keeping interactive latency, chat, and inventory updates consistent.
features: Live shopping / livestream selling with real-time video, host controls, and product pinning during the broadcast.
Shoppable video and reels/stories: tappable product hotspots and 'add to cart' overlays embedded in short-form and long-form video.
Native in-app/in-feed checkout with one-tap and express payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Shop Pay) so users never leave the experience.
Real-time live chat, reactions, and Q&A during streams with moderation tools and pinned messages.
User-generated content (UGC) galleries, photo/video reviews, and ratings tied to products.
Social feed and discovery with follows, likes, shares, comments, and a personalized 'for you' recommendation feed.
Creator/influencer storefronts and curated collections (shoppable profiles and product showcases).
Affiliate / influencer link tracking with unique attributable links, commission rules, conversion tracking, and payout management.
Product catalog management with variants, inventory sync, and real-time stock/availability updates during live events.
AI-powered, socially-aware product recommendations and trend-driven 'what's hot' merchandising.
Integrations and catalog sync with external channels (TikTok Shop, Instagram/Meta Shops, Pinterest, Shopify, WooCommerce).
Push notifications and reminders for live event drops, restocks, price drops, and creator posts.
Group buying, flash sales, limited drops, and gamified promotions (countdowns, vouchers, spin-to-win).
Seller/creator analytics dashboard: GMV, conversion, viewer retention, engagement, and per-product/per-stream performance.
Order management, tracking, returns/refunds, and post-purchase messaging tied back to the social context.
